message:
perf(mvcc/ebr): fast-path retire for monotonic epochs + fix pre-existing test

- retire() no longer allocates a Vec for a single item — inlines
  directly into append_to_epoch_batch
- retire_batch() streams items one at a time instead of collecting into
  a Vec first, eliminating the intermediate heap allocation
- append_to_epoch_batch() checks the last pending batch first (O(1))
  instead of binary_search (O(log n)) + Vec::insert (O(n)) for the
  common monotonically-increasing epoch case
- Fix pre-existing ebr_retire_queue_multiple_epochs test: epoch-0
  batches ARE reclaimable at safe_epoch=1 (0 < 1), test incorrectly
  asserted empty

bd-9s7y4 — EBR retire hot-path optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
